summary: Test suite covers core functionality (expand, exclude, include, fail-fast, max-parallel, max-size, error handling) and includes both unit tests and GitHub Actions workflow integration via act. Strengths: clear organization, good use of pytest fixtures, actionlint validation, exact output assertions via act. Gaps: missing edge cases (include with no base combos, invalid fail-fast type, multiple exclude/include rules, Unicode/special chars), no conftest.py for fixture definitions, fixture/workflow files not shown for verification, act integration limited to 1 run × 3 fixtures, exact JSON string matching is brittle. Would catch regressions in happy path but not all edge cases.
